dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
What should users be able to do?
search rooms, book them, and cancel reservations
Do users need login or authentication?
guests can have accounts, staff definitely should
customer info and payments should be protected

functional: The system shall allow guests and staff to sign in.
The system shall allow guests to search available rooms.
The system shall allow guests to book rooms.
The system shall allow guests to cancel reservations.
non_functional: The system shall provide fast room search responses.
The system shall protect customer information and payment data.
